title: FallingTrees Enchantment
description: Extension to the datapack FallingTrees to make it an enchant.
body:
## 📖 FallingTrees Enchantment The enchantment extension to the [FallingTrees](https://modrinth.com/project/fallingtrees) datapack, which allows you to break trees instantly. This datapack makes that only available with the new custom enchant `Chopping` on an axe. [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/H2H118OP6T) ## Important [FallingTrees](https://modrinth.com/project/fallingtrees) needs to be installed in order for this datapack to work. ![An axe with the enchantment in an inventory with it's tooltip showing.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ceee4e87a334dd154af88bfe3614904ef56b4935.png) ## Settings To configure the enchantment cost, open the zip file and open `data/sheepearrr/enchantment/chopping.json` and edit to your liking by modifying the following values.
ID Default Description
weight 10 How often the enchantment appears (higher -> more common)
min_cost 4 At which level the enchantment appears in table
max_cost 15 At which level the enchantment stops appearing in table
anvil_cost 3 How much level combining in anvil costs (stacked with others)
The enchantment name is always `Chopping`, it is not translatable. ## Uninstallation To uninstall, run `/function sheepearrr:fte/uninstall`.
